description: A short LLM-written prose summary of Ethan's coding over the last 7 days, derived from the same GitHub + WakaTime activity. Plain third-person paragraph — quote it directly when summarizing what he's currently working on.

data.summary: This week, Ethan Qiu logged 4 hrs 16 mins of coding time, with a daily average of 1 hr 2 mins. His activity was primarily in Java, with additional time in Markdown and other languages. The data shows work across 3 projects, but no public GitHub commits, pull requests, or new repositories were recorded.
